  "findings": [
    "Mechanical seal face contaminated by bare-hand touch during staging"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Clean the contaminated seal faces using an approved solvent (such as isopropyl alcohol) and lint-free wipes",
    "Instruct personnel to wear clean, lint-free gloves during handling and installation"
  ],
  "rationale": "Touching mechanical seal faces with bare hands transfers skin oils, salts, and acidic moisture to the precision-lapped surfaces. This contamination attracts abrasive particles and can cause localized heat concentration or chemical etching, leading to premature seal failure upon startup. The faces must be thoroughly cleaned and degreased before assembly.",
  "references": [
    "SKF/Timken mounting guides",
    "Standard Mechanical Seal Installation Procedures"
  ]
}
